economic_notes: WIFN Development LP (100% owned government partnership) holds 15% interest in two wind energy partnerships. Tahgahoning Enterprises Inc. leases approximately 3,740 acres of land from Walpole First Nation annually until June 26, 2029 at $525,000/year. Three GBEs: Three Fires Development Corporation, Tahgahoning Enterprises Inc., Walpole Algonac Ferry Ltd.
notes: Prior period restatement: investment in Giiwedin Noodin FN Energy Corporation reclassified from related parties to energy projects, increasing 2019 accumulated surplus from $53,068,885 to $57,031,251. Health and social expenses reported together as $14,779,104 on Schedule 4; split not available. Economic development expense $2,715,840 included in expenses. Long-term debt includes $16,552,465 government partnership debt plus $1,075,623 other long-term debt. Trust funds in Ottawa of $943,697 treated as restricted cash. ISC funding = Grant + Fixed + Set contributions combined.
